items.title: Trump threatens to take out Iran in 'one night' if no deal before deadline
items.summary: The US president wants Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global energy route, before his Tuesday deadline.

items.title: Trump's Hormuz ultimatum nears - with little indication Iran is on board
items.summary: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.

items.title: Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
items.summary: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 復活節油價創新高 德國研議現金補貼
items.summary: 德國復活節期間油價持續攀升，柴油價格創下歷史新高。在既有油價調控新規未見明顯成效下，德國政府正研議於節後推出新一輪紓困措施，包括直接發放現金補貼，以減輕民眾加油負擔。  根據德國汽車俱樂...…

items.title: 跨越56年里程碑！阿提米絲2號奔月 改寫人類離地球最遠紀錄
items.summary: 美國航太總署（NASA）的「阿提米絲2號」（Artemis II）任務於本月1日升空啟航，NASA於6日指出，阿提米絲2號團隊打破1970年阿波羅13號（Apollo 13）任務...…

items.title: 停火談判期限倒數！川普放話「轟炸伊朗所有電廠及橋樑」
items.summary: 美國總統川普（Donald Trump）6日表示，除非德黑蘭同意在停火談判期限前達成協議，否則他將下令對伊朗所有的發電廠、橋樑等基礎建設發起全面攻擊。  路透報導，川普在白宮...…
